title: $:/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app
description: Zettelkasten-style knowledge app on top of namespace + appify
name: knowledge app
author: rimir
list: readme documentation settings home browse note write changelog license

","type":"text/x-markdown"},"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app/README.md":{"title":"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app/README.md","text":"# tw-knowledge-app A TiddlyWiki plugin: zettelkasten-style knowledge app powered by [`rimir/namespace`](https://github.com/rimir-cc/tw-namespace) and [`rimir/appify`](https://github.com/rimir-cc/tw-appify). ## What it does Notes live under the `knowledge/…` title namespace. They link with short refs (`[[Foo]]`) — the namespace plugin walks up the source path, plus aliases / mounts / pseudos. This plugin adds the app surface: - **Quick-capture** — title + body modal in the topbar. - **Three-tier status** — fleeting → developing → evergreen. - **Backlinks panel** in the Note view (reads namespace's reverse index). - **Write tab** — orphans, stubs, dead-ends, broken refs. - **Search** over knowledge notes. - **Starter mount `kn`** so any tiddler can write `[[kn/topics/foo]]`. - **Custom pseudo `_index`** so `[[_index]]` resolves to a topic's index/README. ## Prerequisites - `rimir/appify` - `rimir/namespace` - `rimir/theme` - `rimir/doc-template` (soft — for the documentation tab) ## Install Add `rimir/knowledge-app` to your wiki's `tiddlywiki.info` `plugins` list and restart the server. ## License MIT. ","type":"text/x-markdown"},"$:/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app/apps/knowledge-sidebar":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app/apps/knowledge-sidebar","tags":"$:/tags/rimir/appify/view","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\import $:/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app/procedures/notes-tree
<$let activeArea={{{ [statewrap-get[area]] }}} activeNote={{{ [statewrap-get[note]] }}} areaPrefix={{{ [!is[blank]then[knowledge/]addsuffixaddsuffix[/]] ~[[knowledge/]] }}} navHistory="$:/state/rimir/statewrap/$:/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app/apps/knowledge/_nav-history" > <%if [is[blank]] %>
Areas
<$list filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]prefix[knowledge/]] :map[removeprefix[knowledge/]split[/]first[]] [all[shadows+tiddlers]tag[$:/tags/rimir/knowledge-app/area]get[area-id]] +[unique[]nsort[]]" variable="areaId" emptyMessage="
No areas yet. Create one with ''+ Area'' in the topbar.
"> <$let areaTiddler={{{ [all[shadows+tiddlers]tag[$:/tags/rimir/knowledge-app/area]] :filter[get[area-id]match] +[first[]] }}} caption={{{ [get[caption]] ~[] }}} icon={{{ [get[icon]] ~[[📂]] }}} areaCountPrefix={{{ [[knowledge/]addsuffixaddsuffix[/]] }}} count={{{ [all[shadows+tiddlers]prefixcount[]] }}} > <$button class="kn-nav-item"> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text="[]"/> <$action-statewrap-set channel="section" value="browse"/> <$action-statewrap-set channel="area" value=<>/> <> <> <> <%else%> <$let activeAreaTiddler={{{ [all[shadows+tiddlers]tag[$:/tags/rimir/knowledge-app/area]] :filter[get[area-id]match] +[first[]] }}}>
<$text text={{{ [get[icon]] ~[[📂]] }}}/> <$text text={{{ [get[caption]] ~[] }}}/>
<$count filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]prefix]"/> notes
<$let notesCollapsedState="$:/state/rimir/knowledge-app/sidebar/notes-collapsed" notesCollapsed={{{ [get[text]match[yes]] }}} notesCount={{{ [all[shadows+tiddlers]prefixcount[]] }}} > <$button class="kn-side-section kn-collapsible-header tc-btn-invisible"> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text={{{ [match[yes]then[]] ~[[yes]] }}}/> <$text text={{{ [match[yes]then[▸]] ~[[▾]] }}}/> Notes (<>) <%if [!match[yes]] %> <$let notesTreeDelimiter={{{ [{$:/config/rimir/knowledge-app/notes-tree-delimiter}trim[]!is[blank]] ~[[/]] }}} > <$list filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]prefixfirst[]]" variable="_check" emptyMessage="
No notes in this area yet.
"> <$transclude $variable="kn-tree-node" internalPrefix="" areaPrefix=<> delimiter=<> depth="0" activeNote=<> navHistory=<>/> <%endif%> <%endif%> <$let scopeLabel={{{ [!is[blank]then[in ]addsuffix] ~[[all areas]] }}}>
Tiers (<>)
<$button class="kn-nav-item"> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text="[]"/> <$action-statewrap-set channel="section" value="browse"/> <$action-statewrap-set channel="area" value=<>/> <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/rimir/knowledge-app/browse/tier" text="fleeting"/> <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/rimir/knowledge-app/browse/type" text=""/> 🪶 Fleeting <$count filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]prefixkn.tier[fleeting]]"/> <$button class="kn-nav-item"> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text="[]"/> <$action-statewrap-set channel="section" value="browse"/> <$action-statewrap-set channel="area" value=<>/> <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/rimir/knowledge-app/browse/tier" text="developing"/> <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/rimir/knowledge-app/browse/type" text=""/> 🌱 Developing <$count filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]prefixkn.tier[developing]]"/> <$button class="kn-nav-item"> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text="[]"/> <$action-statewrap-set channel="section" value="browse"/> <$action-statewrap-set channel="area" value=<>/> <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/rimir/knowledge-app/browse/tier" text="evergreen"/> <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/rimir/knowledge-app/browse/type" text=""/> 🌳 Evergreen <$count filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]prefixkn.tier[evergreen]]"/>
Types (<>)
<$list filter="[{$:/config/rimir/knowledge-app/types}jsonindexes[]]" variable="idx"> <$let typeId={{{ [{$:/config/rimir/knowledge-app/types}jsonget,[id]] }}} typeCaption={{{ [{$:/config/rimir/knowledge-app/types}jsonget,[caption]] }}} typeIcon={{{ [{$:/config/rimir/knowledge-app/types}jsonget,[icon]] }}} typeCountFilter=`[all[shadows+tiddlers]prefixkn.type[$(typeId)$]]` > <$button class="kn-nav-item"> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text="[]"/> <$action-statewrap-set channel="section" value="browse"/> <$action-statewrap-set channel="area" value=<>/> <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/rimir/knowledge-app/browse/tier" text=""/> <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/rimir/knowledge-app/browse/type" text=<>/> <> <> <$count filter=<>/>
"},"$:/config/rimir/appify/splits/$:/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app/apps/knowledge":{"title":"$:/config/rimir/appify/splits/$:/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app/apps/knowledge","type":"application/json","text":"{ "main": { "views": [ { "view": "$:/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app/views/home", "label": "Home", "condition": "[statewrap-get[section]match[home]]" }, { "view": "$:/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app/views/browse", "label": "Browse", "condition": "[statewrap-get[section]match[browse]]" }, { "view": "$:/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app/views/note", "label": "Note", "condition": "[statewrap-get[section]match[note]]" }, { "view": "$:/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app/views/write", "label": "Write", "condition": "[statewrap-get[section]match[write]]" }, { "view": "$:/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app/views/search", "label": "Search", "condition": "[statewrap-get[section]match[search]]" } ] } } "},"$:/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app/apps/knowledge-topbar":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app/apps/knowledge-topbar","tags":"$:/tags/rimir/appify/view","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\import $:/plugins/rimir/knowledge-app/filters/helpers \procedure kn-area-pill(areaId activeArea navHistory) <$let areaTiddler={{{ [all[shadows+tiddlers]tag[$:/tags/rimir/knowledge-app/area]] :filter[get[area-id]match] +[first[]] }}} caption={{{ [get[caption]] ~[] }}} icon={{{ [get[icon]] ~[[📂]] }}} color={{{ [get[color]] }}} cls={{{ [matchthen[kn-topbar-btn kn-area-pill kn-topbar-active]] ~[[kn-topbar-btn kn-area-pill]] }}} style={{{ [!is[blank]then[border-color:]addsuffix] ~[[]] }}} > <$button class=<> style=<
